---
description: Create a change and generate all artifacts needed for implementation in one go
agent: "agent"
argument-hint: "Change name (kebab-case) or description of what to build"
---

Use the `openspec-ff-change` skill from `.claude/skills/openspec-ff-change/SKILL.md`.

Treat any text supplied with this prompt as the change name or a description of what to build. If omitted, the skill will ask.
